query: Vietnam population 2024 estimate population World Bank 2024 Vietnam
answer: Vietnam's population in 2024 was estimated at 100.98 million by the World Bank. This figure aligns closely with other estimates from sources like Statistics of the World and the United Nations Population Fund, which projected it at around 101 million.
